file_insights.purpose: Footer component with copyright, version, navigation links, and support information
key_features: External links with security attributes (noopener noreferrer)
patterns: Ternary operators for i18n: typeof t === 'function' ? t(...) : fallback
Semantic HTML (nav, ul, li with proper ARIA labels)
Tailwind CSS utility classes for styling

file_insights.purpose: Header component with navigation, search, notifications, theme toggle, and user menu
key_features: Responsive design (mobile menu toggle, desktop breadcrumbs)
Theme toggle (light/dark mode with localStorage persistence)
patterns: x-show with transitions for smooth animations
Nested x-data components for isolated state

file_insights.purpose: Sidebar/navigation component with collapsible menu items and active state management
key_features: Responsive design (hidden on mobile, visible on desktop)
Hierarchical menu structure with nested items

file_insights.purpose: Layout template for authentication pages (login, signup, password reset)
key_features: Placeholder for dynamic content via yield

file_insights.purpose: Main admin dashboard layout integrating header, sidebar, and footer
key_features: Flexbox-based layout (header, sidebar, main content, footer)
Alpine.js state management for sidebar toggle

file_insights.purpose: Global styles, CSS variables, and theme customization

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent use of ternary operators for i18n: typeof t === 'function' ? t('key') : 'Fallback text'
patterns_discovered.impact: Ensures UI gracefully degrades when translation function is unavailable

patterns_discovered.description: Local component state managed with x-data, interactive behaviors with @click directives
Semantic HTML with ARIA attributes, sr-only classes, proper heading hierarchy
practices: role='banner' on header, role='contentinfo' on footer
Screen reader-only content with sr-only class

patterns_discovered.description: Mobile-first approach with responsive visibility and layout classes
examples: flex-col sm:flex-row (column on mobile, row on tablet+)

patterns_discovered.description: EJS templates with reusable components (header, footer, sidebar) combined in layouts
patterns_discovered.architecture: Layout → Components pattern following Express/EJS conventions

patterns_discovered.description: Using locals object to check for optional properties before rendering
patterns_discovered.benefit: Prevents errors when components are used without certain data

patterns_discovered.description: Phosphor icon library (ph class prefix) used throughout for consistent iconography
External links include rel='noopener noreferrer' attributes
patterns_discovered.security_benefit: Prevents window.opener access and referrer leakage

patterns_discovered.description: Theme preference persisted to localStorage for maintaining user selection across sessions

gotchas_discovered.issue: @ directives and x-* attributes may conflict with EJS template syntax in some IDEs
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Properly escaped in templates, but developers need IDE support for Alpine.js

gotchas_discovered.issue: Theme toggle sets data-theme attribute on documentElement, but CSS variables must be defined to support light/dark variants
gotchas_discovered.impact: Requires corresponding CSS to be present in main.css for theme switching to work

gotchas_discovered.issue: Multiple breakpoint-specific classes (md:, lg:, sm:) increase class list length and cognitive load
gotchas_discovered.example: hidden md:block lg:hidden mixed with flex flex-col sm:flex-row

gotchas_discovered.issue: Every text string requires checking if t() function exists before calling it
gotchas_discovered.impact: Verbose code with repeated typeof t === 'function' checks throughout templates
gotchas_discovered.suggestion: Could be abstracted to a helper function

gotchas_discovered.issue: Mobile search overlay uses fixed positioning with z-50, must be higher than other elements
gotchas_discovered.impact: z-index management becomes critical as more interactive elements are added

gotchas_discovered.issue: Search input uses @keydown.ctrl.k.window and @keydown.meta.k.window but only for focus, not actual search trigger
gotchas_discovered.impact: User may expect search execution, not just input focus

gotchas_discovered.issue: Notifications container has max-h-80 hardcoded, may not adapt well to different viewport heights

approach_outcome.objective: Create admin-theme with layouts and core components
approach_outcome.completion_summary: Successfully created a complete admin theme with professional-grade components
deliverables: 1 CSS stylesheet with design system variables
implementation_approach: Built responsive design with mobile-first approach
Implemented theme customization with CSS variables
key_achievements: Consistent visual language with Phosphor icons

recommendations.recommendation: Extract i18n fallback logic into a reusable helper function or filter
recommendations.rationale: Reduces repetition of typeof t === 'function' ternary operators throughout templates
recommendations.example: Create filter: <%- t('key') %> instead of <%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('key') : 'fallback' %>

recommendations.recommendation: Document Alpine.js component state and methods in component comments
recommendations.rationale: Complex interactive components (search overlay, notifications) benefit from clear state documentation
recommendations.example: Add JSDoc-style comments above x-data declarations

recommendations.recommendation: Consider extracting repeated icon patterns into icon component fragments
recommendations.rationale: Icon markup (e.g., <i class='ph ph-*'>) is repeated extensively
recommendations.impact: Could reduce template size and improve maintainability

recommendations.recommendation: Test keyboard navigation thoroughly, especially in search overlay and user menu
recommendations.rationale: Complex interactive components require keyboard accessibility validation
recommendations.scope: Ensure Tab, Escape keys work as expected

recommendations.rationale: Color, spacing, and other variables need clear naming conventions and values for consistency

recommendations.recommendation: Implement actual search functionality for the header search component
recommendations.rationale: Currently keyboard shortcut only focuses the input but doesn't trigger search
recommendations.next_steps: Wire up search API endpoint and result rendering

recommendations.recommendation: Add JSDoc type annotations for template variables
recommendations.rationale: Improves IDE autocomplete and prevents undefined variable errors

recommendations.recommendation: Create component tests for interactive Alpine.js behaviors
recommendations.rationale: Sidebar toggle, theme switching, and menu interactions should be tested
recommendations.scope: Test state changes and DOM updates
